title: Phase 1.2: Pattern Extraction & Lesson Creation
context: Extract learnings from task outcomes. Create outcome_learnings table, implement LessonExtractor with rule-based pattern detection (missing tests, unclear names, error handling, validation), add CLI command for manual extraction. See detailed spec in docs/handoffs/learning-phase-1.2-pattern-extraction.md. Depends on Phase 1.1.
acceptance: 1) outcome_learnings table exists. 2) OutcomeLearning model in models.py. 3) LessonExtractor extracts patterns from feedback. 4) 5+ programmer patterns implemented (tests, names, errors, docstrings, validation). 5) CLI command works: python app/cli/extract_learnings.py --agent programmer. 6) GET /api/learning/learnings endpoint. 7) POST /api/learning/extract endpoint. 8) Confidence updates on success/failure. 9) Low-confidence deactivation logic. 10) Unit tests >80% coverage.
